title: sorghum liebmannii
intro: Sorghum liebmannii, also known as Liebmann's sorghum, is a type of flowering plant in the sorghum genus and is native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sorghum liebmannii include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sorghum liebmannii typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the leaves and flowers of the plant.
